message:
Refactor codegen to package structure, remove empty src folders

Structure Changes:
✅ Moved codegen.py → codegen/ package
- packages/core/zyth_core/codegen/__init__.py (exports generate_code)
- packages/core/zyth_core/codegen/generator.py (main code, 2500 lines)

✅ Removed empty src/ folders:
- Deleted packages/core/src/ (empty)
- Deleted packages/async/src/ (empty)
- Deleted packages/cli/src/ (empty)
- Deleted packages/http/src/ (empty)
- Deleted packages/ai/src/ (empty)
- Deleted packages/db/src/ (empty)
- Kept packages/runtime/src/ (contains runtime.zig)

Why This Change:
- Prepares for future splitting into modules (expressions, statements, builtins)
- Currently all code still in generator.py to avoid breaking changes
- Allows incremental refactoring as conflicts increase
- Imports still work: "from zyth_core.codegen import generate_code"

Documentation Updates:
- Updated CLAUDE.md with new structure
- Updated all path references (codegen.py → codegen/generator.py)
- Kept coordination guidelines for agent work

Test Results: ✅ All tests still pass (104/142 passing, 38 pre-existing failures)

Next Steps:
- When agent conflicts increase, split generator.py into:
  - base.py (state, utilities)
  - expressions.py (visit_expr - 500+ lines)
  - statements.py (statement visitors)
  - builtins.py (built-in handlers)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+"""
+Zyth Code Generator Package
+"""
+from zyth_core.codegen.generator import generate_code, ZigCodeGenerator, ClassInfo
+
+__all__ = ['generate_code', 'ZigCodeGenerator', 'ClassInfo']
